title: Update CircularProgress/LinearProgress warnings
body: The min/max props on both `CircularProgress` and `LinearProgress` were causing incorrect warnings when the variant was 'indeterminate' or 'query'. This PR updates the logic to correctly ignore these props for those variants, while still warning when they are invalid in other contexts.

title: [progress] Show runtime errors only once
